packedRune.description:
<Patriot> <@recalrune.nag>no longer waits</>
In Marching Stance, <Patriot> receives <@recalrune.nag>90%</> less physical and Arts damage from Operators who are not blocking him, effect decreasing while he is blocked to <@recalrune.pos>0%</>, until he is no longer blocked.
In Ruination stance, stays Invulnerable for an <@recalrune.nag>increased</> period of time, deals <@recalrune.nag>increased</> True Damage to surrounding units, javelin damage is <@recalrune.nag>increased</>
All enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> HP, <@recalrune.nag>+25%</> ATK, and <@recalrune.nag>status resistance</>
Life Points reduced to <@recalrune.nag>2</>
All Elite enemies have <@recalrune.nag>200%</> HP, and <@recalrune.nag>140%</> ATK and DEF
<Patriot> and all regular enemies have <@recalrune.nag>150%</> HP and gain <@recalrune.nag>+50</> ASPD

<Patriot> gains <@recalrune.nag>+200%</> HP, is <@recalrune.nag>immune</> to Slow, Stun, Bind, Cold, Frozen, Frighten, Sleep, Fear, Levitate, and Lure while in Marching Stance, and Movement Speed cannot be lower than base speed. When <Patriot> is on the field, all Operators actively retreated will have <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> Redeployment Time

All allies have <@recalrune.nag>+7</> DP Cost

<Guerrilla Siegebreaker Leaders> are replaced by <Elite Ursus Assault Crossbowmen>. <Guerrilla Siegebreakers> and <Elite Ursus Assault Crossbowmen> <@recalrune.nag>spawn earlier</> and gain <@recalrune.nag>+200%</> ATK
<Guerrilla Herald Leaders> and <Guerrilla Shieldguard Leaders> will appear at start, and gain <@recalrune.nag>+200%</> HP, <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> DEF, and <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> ATK
<Guerrilla Herald Leaders> and <Guerrilla Shieldguard Leaders> will spawn on the map later, and gain <@recalrune.nag>+200%</> HP, <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> DEF, and <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> ATK
All friendly low ground units ASPD <@recalrune.nag>-40</>

level_recalrune_01-01.levelDesc:
A recreation of our first encounter with Patriot.
They are commanded by the 'Aegis' of the Infected. The most ancient bloodline among the warriors of Sarkaz. Ursus's indomitable incarnation of war. The backbone of the Reunion Movement. Yelena’s father.
<@lv.item><Originium Altar></> Periodically emits gas to the surrounding tiles, damaging both allied and enemy units.
<@lv.item><Interference Mine></> Upon explosion, deals heavy damage to the surrounding enemies and amplifies the damage they take for 15 seconds.

packedRune.description:
<Originium Slugs α> <@recalrune.pos>no longer deduct Life Points</> when entering the Objective Point, but gain <@recalrune.nag>+1000%</> HP
All enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+180%</> HP, <@recalrune.nag>+140%</> ATK
<Light-Armored Soldiers> gain <@recalrune.nag>+800</> DEF
<Wraiths> gain <@recalrune.nag>+400%</> HP and status resistance
All allied units have <@recalrune.nag>-50%</> ATK and <@recalrune.nag>-50</> ASPD

<Defender-4s> appear to protect slugs, and have <@recalrune.nag>+50</> RES; grants extra <@recalrune.nag>+600</> DEF
<Blocker-Ps> appear to protect slugs, and have <@recalrune.nag>+900</> DEF; grants extra <@recalrune.nag>+40</> RES
<Wasteland Robbers> will appear at start
<Elite Wasteland Robbers> will appear at start

level_recalrune_01-02.levelDesc:
A recreation of the toughest combat environment obtained from battle records.
Defend against the enemy's surprise attack.
<@lv.rem>DP will not automatically recover in this operation; gain DP from enemy kills.</>

packedRune.description:
<Jammers> no longer available on start, but <Luxury Sponsor Drones> will appear with <Jammer> drops. Jammers are <@recalrune.pos>less likely</> to be targeted by enemies, and have <@recalrune.pos>700%</> HP
1 extra Frost spawns at the start, and Frosts gain <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> DEF, <@recalrune.nag>+300%</> HP
<Arts Master A1> and <Arts Master A2> gain <@recalrune.nag>+300%</> HP and <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> ATK
<Luxury Sponsor Drones> gain <@recalrune.nag>+300%</> HP and have <@recalrune.nag>400%</> Movement Speed
All allied units have <@recalrune.nag>-30%</> ATK and <@recalrune.nag>-30%</> HP
Life Points reduced to <@recalrune.nag>1</>

selector.professionMask: WARRIOR, SNIPER, TANK, MEDIC, SUPPORT, CASTER, SPECIAL, TOKEN, TRAP, PIONEER

packedRune.description: <Jammers> can also be deployed on low ground tiles, and deduct <@recalrune.nag>3</> DP every <@recalrune.nag>3</> seconds
<Jammers> can only be deployed on high ground tiles
Enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+60%</> Movement Speed and <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP
Enemies have <@recalrune.pos>-40%</> Movement Speed, but gain <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP and <@recalrune.nag>+{atk:0%}</> ATK
<Imperial Artillery Core Targeteers> and <Frosts> <@recalrune.nag>will not</> be disabled by Jammer effects, and <Frosts> gain <@recalrune.nag>Silence resist</>
<Arts Master A1> and <Art Master A2> <@recalrune.nag>will not</> be disabled by Jammer effects
Extra <Imperial Artillery Core Targeteers> will appear, and gain <@recalrune.nag>+{def:0%}</> DEF, <@recalrune.nag>+{atk:0%}</> ATK, and <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP
<Frosts> take <@recalrune.nag>{damage_resistance:0%}</> damage when attacked by units outside attack range, and gain <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP
<Arts Master A1s> and <Art Master A2s>gain <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP, <@recalrune.nag>+{atk:0%}</> ATK, and <@recalrune.nag>+{def:0%}</> DEF
All allies gain <@recalrune.nag>+75%</> Redeployment Time

packedRune.description: <Luxury Sponsor Drones> are <@recalrune.nag>immune</> to Sleep, Freeze, and Stun, and gain <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP
<Luxury Sponsor Drones> gain <@recalrune.nag>+{atk:0}</> ATK, <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP, and deal <@recalrune.nag>{atk_scale:0%}</> ATK as Arts damage when taking physical and Arts damage
All enemies have <@recalrune.nag>{max_hp:0%}</> HP and <@recalrune.nag>{def:0%}</> DEF
All enemies have <@recalrune.nag>{atk:0%}</> ATK
All enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+{magic_resistance:0}</> RES and have <@recalrune.nag>{max_hp:0%}</>x HP
<Defender-4s> have <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP; grants extra <@recalrune.nag>+{defup.def}</> DEF
The additional <Frost> will be replaced by an <Imperial Artillery Core Targeteer> at start. The <Imperial Artillery Core Targeteer> gains <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> HP

<Spec Ops Caster Leaders> will appear at start, and have <@recalrune.nag>{max_hp}x</> Max HP, <@recalrune.nag>{def}x</> DEF, <@recalrune.nag>{atk}x</> ATK, and Attack Range <@recalrune.nag>increased</>
Natural DP regeneration rate is reduced by <@recalrune.nag>50%</>
Natural DP regeneration rate is reduced by <@recalrune.nag>75%</>
Max Squad size is reduced to <@recalrune.nag>{value}</> Operators
Deployment limit is reduced to <@recalrune.nag>5</>
The DP Cost of Defender, Sniper and Supporter Operators is <@recalrune.nag>doubled</>
The DP Cost of Defender, Sniper and Supporter Operators is <@recalrune.nag>tripled</>
The DP Cost of Specialist, Caster and Medic Operators is <@recalrune.nag>doubled</>
The DP Cost of Specialist, Caster and Medic Operators is <@recalrune.nag>tripled</>

level_recalrune_01-03.levelDesc:
A recreation of the biggest drone army we faced in Lungmen. 
The enemy is attacking with the full force of their drone armada! Proper use of Snipers and Casters is the key to victory. 
<@lv.item><Jammer></> Prevents nearby enemy drones from attacking, greatly reduces their speed, and disables their special abilities.

packedRune.description:
All enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+80%</> Max HP, <@recalrune.nag>+60%</> ATK, and <@recalrune.nag>+400</> DEF
All allies have <@recalrune.nag>-40%</> ATK and <@recalrune.nag>-40%</>Max HP
More <Dublinn Elite Companion Guards> and <Dublinn Elite Companion Shadowblades> will appear
<Dublinn Flamerazer Leaders> that can force their way through <Tattered Pillars> will appear

packedRune.description: <Purifying Flames> deal <@recalrune.nag>{atk:0%}</> damage, Max Life Points are reduced to <@recalrune.nag>1</>
<Purifying Flames> deal <@recalrune.pos>{atk:0%}</> damage, but will <@recalrune.nag>deduct 1 Life Point</> after entering the Objective Point
All Elite enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+1200</> DEF
All enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+30</> RES, all Elite enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>Refraction</> and <@recalrune.nag>Silence resist</>

More <Dublinn Elite Companion Guards> and <Dublinn Elite Companion Shadowblades> will appear, <Dublinn Elite Companion Guards> gain <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> Max HP and <@recalrune.nag>+{def}</> DEF; <Dublinn Elite Companion Shadowblades> gain <@recalrune.nag>+100%</> ATK and <@recalrune.nag>+80%</> Max HP

More <Dublinn Elite Companion Guards> and <Dublinn Elite Companion Shadowblades> will appear, and when close to the other, <Dublinn Elite Companion Guards> reduce allied units ASPD by an extra <@recalrune.nag>{traitAbility.attack_speed}</>, while <Dublinn Elite Companion Shadowblades> have further <@recalrune.nag>increased</> ASPD

<Dublinn Phalanx Commanders> will appear. <Dublinn Phalanx Commanders> gain <@recalrune.nag>+{atk:0%}</> ATK, <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> Max HP; when other <Dublinn Phalanx Commanders> are nearby, gain extra <@recalrune.nag>+{auraDefup.def}</> DEF
All enemies gain <@recalrune.nag>+50%</> Movement Speed
<Dublinn Flamerazer Leader> will appear on the left side of the map at start

<Tattered Pillars> appear in different positions, have <@recalrune.nag>{max_hp:0%}</> Max HP, gain <@recalrune.nag>+{def}</> DEF, and <Dublinn Flamerazer Leaders> will appear on the right side of the map at start

<Dublinn Flamerazer Leaders> gain <@recalrune.nag>+{max_hp:0%}</> Max HP, explosion damage on death increased to <@recalrune.nag>{atk_scale:0%}</>

level_recalrune_01-04.levelDesc:
A recreation of our fight against Dublinn Casters at County Hillock.
Enemy fireballs cover the whole battlefield. Stay calm under fire and protect yourself.
<@lv.item><Tattered Pillar></> Can be knocked down by neighboring Operators, dealing True damage to the two tiles it falls on and forming rubble that blocks routes.
